reliability_run.temporal_diff_hint: Diff reliability_run + metrics + shadow_dashboard across run_id within same freeze_window.

calibration_priority.rationale: System awarding a criterion the teacher rejected is higher academic risk than withholding.

interpretation_notes: Percentiles (incl. p5/p95) surface tail risk; means can hide bimodal or rare catastrophic FP.
Histogram bins are coarse defaults; adjust as N grows.
Correlate with gold review_complexity; narrow samples (one teacher, one difficulty band) bias calibration.
Rates above ~0.6 on a balanced cohort suggest review gate inflation.
Severity skew toward high/critical without FP correlation also warrants trigger audit.

teacher_shadow_agreement.note: Shadow sufficiency vs teacher achieved — observational only; do not wire to grading.

human_reviewer_agreement_notes.description: Compare reviewer_taxonomy on FP/FN rows with taxonomy_suggestion; high divergence may indicate human inconsistency.
